summary: Performed a full codebase analysis of the Vijdon taxi app. Read all Django backend files (settings, urls, models, views, api_views, serializers, admin, all HTML templates, context_processors) and all Flutter driver app Dart files (main, theme, constants, api_service, models, all screens, all widgets, pubspec.yaml). Produced a comprehensive report covering current features, code quality issues, security problems, missing features, and improvement areas for both the backend and Flutter frontend.
current_status: Analysis complete. Project is a functional MVP: Django admin panel + REST API backend paired with a Flutter driver app. Core ride lifecycle works end-to-end. Main gaps: no authentication on web panel, hardcoded secret key in settings, SQLite in production, no real-time push notifications, no client-facing app, no pagination, no rate limiting, no tests.
